## Files matching `**/*`

When creating, updating, inserting, or deleting a Mapper/mapper-2 element in an integration chain, or when mapping source element data to a target element, apply the `mapper-element-skill` skill.

## Files matching `**/{apm.yml,SKILL.md,*.instructions.md,*.prompt.md,*.agent.md,CLAUDE.md,AGENTS.md}`

When editing any APM primitive (`apm.yml`, `*.instructions.md`, `SKILL.md`,
`*.prompt.md`, `*.agent.md`, hooks, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`),
apply the `apm-authoring` skill.

In a repo that uses APM, do not edit `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`,
or deployed skill files directly — they are regenerated by
`apm install` / `apm compile`. Edit the matching primitive under
`.apm/` and re-run `apm compile`.
